original: We have breaking news now in Sydney where two officers have escaped serious injury after
translation: Anyị nwere ozi kachasị ọhụrụ ugbu a na Sydney ebe ndị uwe ojii abụọ gbapụrụ mmerụ ahụ siri ike mgbe

original: a police car crashed and flipped in the city's west.
translation: Ụgbọala ndị uwe ojii dara ma tụgharịa n'ebe ọdịda anyanwụ obodo ahụ.

original: It landed on its roof in Gilford around 5.30 this morning when the constables from Auburn
translation: Ọ dakwasịrị n'elu ụlọ ya na Gilford n'ihe dị ka elekere ise na ọkara nke ụtụtụ a mgbe ndị uwe ojii si Auburn

original: were responding to reports of men acting suspiciously in a car.
translation: ha na-azaghachi akụkọ banyere ndị ikom na-eme ihe na-enyo enyo n'ụgbọala.

original: Both officers are now being checked out at hospital.
translation: A na-enyocha ndị uwe ojii abụọ ahụ ugbu a n'ụlọ ọgwụ.
